levels.title: Foundation
levels.subtitle: Start from zero
levels.description: Small French blocks for pronunciation, recognition, and imitation.

levels.title: Intensive
levels.subtitle: A2 bridge
levels.description: Systematic A1-to-A2 bridge lessons: past, pronouns, connectors, problems, opinions, and short output.

levels.title: A2 Med
levels.subtitle: Middle A2
levels.description: Mid-A2 lessons for smoother pronouns, connected speech, polite requests, practical stories, and structured output.

levels.title: A2 Hi
levels.subtitle: High A2 to B1 bridge
levels.description: High-A2 lessons for stronger narration, nuanced opinions, hypothetical sentences, practical writing, structured speaking, and B1 readiness.

levels.title: Intermediate
levels.subtitle: A2 to B1 bridge
levels.description: Thirty bridge lessons that turn A2 knowledge into early B1 speaking, writing, summarizing, explaining, and reacting.

levels.title: B1 Med
levels.subtitle: Native-style B1 practice
levels.description: Forty B1 lessons with natural chunks, realistic short inputs, connected speaking, practical writing, and native-style listening/reading at an accessible level.

levels.title: B1 Hi
levels.subtitle: Advanced B1 native-style practice
levels.description: Forty high-B1 lessons using accessible native-style news, opinions, conversations, summaries, reflections, and structured output to prepare for the next stage.

levels.title: B1 Output
levels.subtitle: Speak and write at B1
levels.description: Thirty output-focused B1 lessons for speaking, writing, summarizing native-style input, reacting, arguing, and self-correcting with practical routines.

levels.title: Growth
levels.subtitle: B1 to B2 bridge
levels.description: Thirty B1+ bridge lessons for native-style input, synthesis, nuance, longer reasoning, register control, and readiness for systematic B2 work.
